title: Security Models: Formalizing Cryptographic Guarantees
description: Understand how cryptographers formally define and prove security. Learn about attack models, security definitions, and why these formal foundations matter for post-quantum cryptography.
learningObjectives: Explain the importance of formal security models in cryptography
Describe different adversary models and their capabilities
Understand security definitions: IND-CPA, IND-CCA, EUF-CMA
Differentiate between computational and information-theoretic security
Analyze security reductions and what they guarantee
Evaluate post-quantum security considerations in formal models
